name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Merry Christmas from Jerusalem
body:
Hi Peter,
I'm in Jerusalem celebrating the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ, and wanted to send a quick video message to all our supporters at My Faith Votes.
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FQ19ZpJsY7Z0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171225_xms_s1&n=1)
[https://youtu.be/Q19ZpJsY7Z0](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FQ19ZpJsY7Z0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171225_xms_s1&n=2)
Have a Merry Christmas and a Blessed New Year!
-Mike
Sent from my iPhone
©2017 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171225_xms_s1&n=3).

name: Denise and Greg Pence
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
For unto us a Child is born! From mine to yours, we wish you and your family a Merry Christmas! - Denise and Greg Pence | |

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Merry Christmas from My Family to Yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter,
I just wanted to send a note to wish you a very Merry Christmas on this special Christmas Day. To the many people who have been so wonderful and supportive in 2017, I appreciate you and hope that your holiday is filled with all of the blessings of the season. From our family to yours, a very Merry Christmas!!
---
|
---
| Jill Vogel
